nav.announcement: Fair Trade Certified by Label STEP | Free Worldwide Shipping
nav.footerDescription: Authentic handmade Moroccan home goods, crafted by 3rd generation Berber artisans. Rugs, pillows, candles, ceramics, argan oil & brass lamps.

home.heroSubtitle: Transform your space with handcrafted Moroccan treasures — from artisan rugs and pillows to scented candles, ceramics, argan oil products, and brass lamps.
home.featuredSubtitle: Discover our handpicked selection of authentic Moroccan craftsmanship, each piece unique and crafted with care.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Explore our curated collections of Moroccan artisan goods
home.whyDescription: For over three generations, our family has been crafting the finest Moroccan home goods in the Atlas Mountains. Each piece tells a story of ancient Berber traditions, skilled hands, and patterns passed down through centuries.
home.customDescription: Working on a special project? We offer bespoke design services for rugs, ceramics, and more. Choose your size, colors, and patterns.
home.reviewsSubtitle: Join 934+ happy customers who transformed their homes with our products
home.visitDescription: We invite you to visit our workshop in the Atlas Mountains and witness the ancient art of Moroccan craftsmanship firsthand.

about.heroSubtitle: Three generations of Berber craftsmanship from the Atlas Mountains

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our products? Need help choosing the perfect piece for your space? We're here to help.
